name: Seri 24x24 Gambrel Roof Garage Plan - Classic Barn-Style 2-Car Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Construction Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style roof creates expanded overhead space while maintaining a compact footprint perfect for residential lots.
Large interior footprint accommodates vehicles, tools, lawn equipment, motorcycles, or workshop areas with room to move.
The double-slope roof design increases headroom and allows for loft storage or optional future finishing.
Traditional framing techniques and straightforward structural layout make Seri suitable for DIY builders and contractors alike.
description_summary: Kickstart your next property upgrade with the Seri 24x24 Gambrel Roof Garage - a spacious and highly versatile barn-style garage designed to deliver maximum storage, classic curb appeal, and practical everyday functionality. Featuring the signature gambrel roof profile, clean vertical siding lines, and a balanced front elevation, Seri blends timeless architecture with efficient design that works beautifully in residential, rural, and workshop settings.
